title: Add input default assignments to iCE40 cell library
body:
- [x] create support macros
- [x] add default assignments for SB_LUT4 inputs
- [ ] ~~add default assignments for SB_CARRY inputs~~
- [x] add default assignments for SB_DFF* inputs
- [x] add default assignments for SB_RAM40_* inputs
- [ ] ~~add default assignments for SB_MAC16_* inputs~~
- [ ] ~~add default assignments for ICESTORM_LC inputs~~
- [ ] ~~add default assignments for ICESTORM_RAM inputs~~

Lattice Reference Document containing (some of) the default assignments:
http://www.latticesemi.com/~/media/LatticeSemi/Documents/TechnicalBriefs/SBTICETechnologyLibrary201608.pdf

closes #2390
